TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Halloween, o Hallowe'en, (uyraya tamiu Allhalloween, All Hallows' Eve, o All Saints' Eve), a nu irey a murutay a nu sulu a kamuy a ru 31 a nulu, a mu a nawa a Western Christian a ru All Hallows' Day. A mu nawa a murutay a nu Allhallowtide, a nu kamuy a mu liturgical a ru a mu irey a ngitngit a nu su, a mu nu asu a nu hallows, a mu nu martyrs, ku a mu nu asu a mu efu niu. A nu popular culture, a nu tamiu a mu a murutay a nu horror, ya mu mu a mu macabre ku supernatural. Kising gaga tawa, a nu kising a ru Halloween a miyat a nu Celtic a nu murutay a mu harvest festivals, a mu nu Gaelic a nu festival a Samhain, ya nu murutay a mu pagan a nu kabin. Suku ru a nu Samhain a mu a nu Christianized a mu All Hallow's Day, ya mu a mu niyu a nu ikalis, a mu a nu Church a mu a ru mu git. A ru kising a nu a yate a ru Halloween a mu nu Christian a nu holiday, a mu nu vigil a nu All Hallow's Day. A mu murutay a mu Ireland ku Scotland a nu gaga, a mu irish ku scottish a nu immigrants a mu a nu Halloween a mu a nu customs a mu a nu North America a nu 19th century, ku a mu a nu American influence a nu Halloween a mu a nu customs a mu a nu sabat a mu a mu 20th ku 21st century.
S.PHON: ha…≠…≠uw…ô…ôn, u ha…≠…≠uw…ô Ē…ôn, (ujraja tamiu a…≠…≠ha…≠…≠uw…ô…ôn, a…≠…≠ ha…≠…≠uws Ē …ôv…ô, u a…≠…≠ saints Ē …ôv…ô), a nu ir…ôj a murutaj a nu su…≠u a kamuj a ru ** a nu…≠u, a mu a nawa a w…ôst…ôrn ¶hristian a ru a…≠…≠ ha…≠…≠uws Ē daj. a mu nawa a murutaj a nu a…≠…≠ha…≠…≠uwtid…ô, a nu kamuj a mu …≠iturgi ¶a…≠ a ru a mu ir…ôj a ŇčitŇčit a nu su, a mu nu asu a nu ha…≠…≠uws, a mu nu martjrs, ku a mu nu asu a mu …ô*u niu. a nu pupu…≠ar ¶u…≠tur…ô, a nu tamiu a mu a murutaj a nu hurrur, ja mu mu a mu ma ¶abr…ô ku sup…ôrnatura…≠. kisiŇč gaga tawa, a nu kisiŇč a ru ha…≠…≠uw…ô…ôn a mijat a nu ¶…ô…≠ti ¶ a nu murutaj a mu harv…ôst *…ôstiva…≠s, a mu nu ga…ô…≠i ¶ a nu *…ôstiva…≠ a samhain, ja nu murutaj a mu pagan a nu kabin. suku ru a nu samhain a mu a nu ¶hristianiz…ôd a mu a…≠…≠ ha…≠…≠uw Ēs daj, ja mu a mu niju a nu ika…≠is, a mu a nu ¶hur ¶h a mu a ru mu git. a ru kisiŇč a nu a jat…ô a ru ha…≠…≠uw…ô…ôn a mu nu ¶hristian a nu hu…≠idaj, a mu nu vigi…≠ a nu a…≠…≠ ha…≠…≠uw Ēs daj. a mu murutaj a mu ir…ô…≠and ku s ¶ut…≠and a nu gaga, a mu irish ku s ¶uttish a nu immigrants a mu a nu ha…≠…≠uw…ô…ôn a mu a nu ¶ustums a mu a nu nurth am…ôri ¶a a nu **th ¶…ônturj, ku a mu a nu am…ôri ¶an in*…≠u…ôn ¶…ô a nu ha…≠…≠uw…ô…ôn a mu a nu ¶ustums a mu a nu sabat a mu a mu **th ku **st ¶…ônturj.
S.FORM: Halloween, o Hallowe'en, (uyraya tamiu Allhalloween, All Hallows' Eve, o All Saints' Eve), a nu irey a murutay a nu sulu a kamuy a ru 31 a nulu, a mu a nawa a Western Christian a ru All Hallows' Day. A mu nawa a murutay a nu Allhallowtide, a nu kamuy a mu liturgical a ru a mu irey a ngitngit a nu su, a mu nu asu a nu hallows, a mu nu martyrs, ku a mu nu asu a mu efu niu. A nu popular culture, a nu tamiu a mu a murutay a nu horror, ya mu mu a mu macabre ku supernatural. Kising gaga tawa, a nu kising a ru Halloween a miyat a nu Celtic a nu murutay a mu harvest festivals, a mu nu Gaelic a nu festival a Samhain, ya nu murutay a mu pagan a nu kabin. Suku ru a nu Samhain a mu a nu Christianized a mu All Hallow's Day, ya mu a mu niyu a nu ikalis, a mu a nu Church a mu a ru mu git. A ru kising a nu a yate a ru Halloween a mu nu Christian a nu holiday, a mu nu vigil a nu All Hallow's Day. A mu murutay a mu Ireland ku Scotland a nu gaga, a mu irish ku scottish a nu immigrants a mu a nu Halloween a mu a nu customs a mu a nu North America a nu 19th century, ku a mu a nu American influence a nu Halloween a mu a nu customs a mu a nu sabat a mu a mu 20th ku 21st century.
